title: Track A ablation — pre-registration (TEMPLATE; fill before any outcomes are seen)

framework_under_test.model_snapshot: FILL: model id + training cutoff date (validates a framework x model pair)

hypotheses.H2_structure_vs_raw_model: full arm beats raw_model on the primary metric (paired)
hypotheses.H3_independent_estimate_value: full beats consensus_relative_only (the consensus-independent estimate adds value)

universe: FILL: e.g. Russell 1000 PIT constituents, survivorship-free
sampling: FILL: stratified random by sector x size x regime; target N and minimum detectable effect

leakage.model_cutoff_gating: outcome horizon must postdate the test model's training cutoff for a CLEAN case

decision_rule.require: for each registered contrast, the leakage-adjusted CI excludes 0 in the hypothesized direction
decision_rule.note: primary gate is H2 (structure beats raw model); H3 greenlights the Phase-1 independent-estimator keystone first

governance: independent sign-off on this registration and on the leakage audit before results are read; reviewer != builder
